title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 in predicting drug properties, toxicity, antibodies, and enables drug repurposing and new molecular design.
